name: plan009-restore-claude-interior-cron
description: Restore apartment:today-interior-recommendations cron role boundary so OpenClaw/Codex orchestrates and Claude native skill performs the interior recommendation workflow.

phases.title: Add explicit Claude runner and document runner boundary
Edit OpenClaw cron payload to invoke Claude runner

findings: 427835d introduced the native Claude skill and documented claude -p availability, but run_digest.sh was a scaffold from the start.
2f2117c slimmed the OpenClaw cron payload from prescriptive workflow steps to a short SKILL.md/config delegation note, exposing that the cron was still Codex agentTurn based.
The fix is to make the Codex cron turn explicitly run the Claude native skill through a thin shell runner.
OpenClaw cron 9a6ac82d now tells Codex to run scripts/apartment-interior-reference-digest/run_with_claude.sh and to never reply NO_REPLY.
